name: accounting firms managing 5–15 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients, inconsistent reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate depreciation schedules instead of manual calculations and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent and delayed asset depreciation reporting
